webpage.para: SilkPage is an open source project. That means it is primarily community-driven work. You too, can participate. Here are some of the ways you can participate/contribute to the SilkPage project.

listitem.para: Report Bugs Bug reports are very helpful to us and great way to contribute to the SilkPage project. Please make sure you can reproduce the problem, and be very explicit in your description.
Request Feature If there's feature you'd like to see, or something you can imagine improving, let us know, we will plan it in our new features »
Contribute Website Content New content or updates to existing content are always welcome! Articles like FAQs are very very helpful. See existing documentation »
Contribute Code sources are always packed in the distributions. If there's a feature you'd like to see, or a bug you'd like to see fixed, you have the power to make that happen. Download Sources »

Design our logo that's right we urgently need a well designed logo. Your design will be displayed on every page that is SilkPaged. Please refer to the Logo Design Guidelines to find about the requirements.

webpage.para: Willing to help? Get in touch.
